dict.string: OpenBurnBar uses the camera only when you choose Take Photo to attach an image to a Hermes chat or start a trusted Mercury video call.
OpenBurnBar uses the local network to connect this iPhone or iPad to your trusted Mac for pairing, Hermes relay, and media sessions.
OpenBurnBar uses the microphone only when you start voice commands or a trusted Mercury audio call.
OpenBurnBar reads device motion only to adapt the mobile dashboard while you are using the app.
OpenBurnBar saves received media to your photo library only when you choose Save.
OpenBurnBar accesses selected photo library items only when you choose Photo Library to attach media to a Hermes chat.
OpenBurnBar uses speech recognition only while you hold the voice command control to turn your spoken command into text.
